description: Use this API to save the PSSE working case in a saved case file. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = save(sfile)

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the psse saved case file if sfile is “*”, savenw attempts to use the most recently accessed saved case file. if no saved case file was accessed in the current execution of psse, savenw returns an error code. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
